title: My Dream World [Create]
body:
### **rhy5s' Create Mod Series Modpack [Forge 1.20.1]**

This modpack is built around the create mod with the aim to enhance the create experience by amplifying the vanilla terrain, adding a bunch of create addons, better visuals, sounds & much MORE!

**Main Mods:**
- Create
- 16 Create Mod Addons
- Amplified Nether
- Beans Backpacks
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
- Corpse
- Dynamic Lights
- Dungeons and Taverns
- End's Phantasm
- Farmer's Delight
- FramedBlocks
- Just Enough Items
- Jade
- Nature's Compass
- Storage Drawers
- Terralith
- Xaero's Minimap

**Resource Packs:**
- Fresh Animations
- Better Enchanting Table
- Enchanting Table Magic Circle
- Enchant Icons
- Fancy Crops

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2G0EpI4naOk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

All mods are property of their owners I am not associated nor do I develop any of the mods in this modpack! BIG THANK YOU to all the developers for making the mods!
